description_long: This object is a large, stylized sword with a broad, straight blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is metallic and features a subtle blue-gray coloration, giving it a slightly fantastical or ceremonial appearance. The crossguard is prominent and angular, extending outward with sharp, triangular points on both sides, adding to its aggressive and defensive design. The handle is short and robust, ending in a faceted pommel that mirrors the angular motif of the guard. The entire sword has a monolithic, almost sculptural quality, with clean lines and a matte finish. There are no visible engravings or decorative inlays, emphasizing a functional yet imposing aesthetic.
description: A large, angular sword with a straight, blue-gray blade and a prominent, spiked crossguard. The design is bold and monolithic, with a matte metallic finish and no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the straight blade, the wide, spiked crossguard, and the faceted pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the crossguard's thickness visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and pommel from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the angular geometry of the crossguard and handle.
attribute_handle_design: short, faceted, metallic, angular pommel, no visible grip texture
